zh.lifeSummary: 當Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar於1152年3月8日出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴時，他的父親Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar30歲，母親Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar23歲。他於1184年與Ada of Scotland在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1232年12月31日在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴鄧巴享年80歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾埃克爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar于1152年3月8日出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴时，他的父亲Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar30岁，母亲Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar23岁。他于1184年与Ada of Scotland在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1232年12月31日在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴鄧巴享年80岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰貝維其可爾埃克爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Patrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar was born on 8 March 1152, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar, was 30 and his mother, Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar, was 23. He married Ada of Scotland in 1184, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 31 December 1232, in Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 80, and was buried in Eccles, Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar est né le 8 mars 1152, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Ada of Scotland en 1184, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 31 décembre 1232, à Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Eccles, Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar am 8. März 1152 in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar 30 und seine Mutter Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar 23. Er hat 1184 in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Ada of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 31. Dezember 1232 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Eccles, Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar è nato il il 8 marzo 1152 nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Ada of Scotland nel 1184, nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 31 dicembre 1232, nel Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Eccles, Berwickshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbarが1152年3月8日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーで生まれた時，父Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbarは30歳，母Aline MacCrinan of Dunbarは23歳であった。1184年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーでAda of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1232年12月31日にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンダンバーダンバーで80歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアエククレスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar(이)가 1152년 3월 8일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1184년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 Ada of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1232년 12월 31일 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던바 던바에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르 치레스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar nasceu em 8 de março de 1152, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Ada of Scotland em 1184, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de dezembro de 1232, em Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Eccles, Berwickshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar родился 8 марта 1152 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Ada of Scotland в 1184 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 31 декабря 1232 г. в местности дунбар, дунбар, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности экклесь, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
